result.stdout:
Scaffold a new .NET Web API application with user management and business features

Usage: dotnet-new-webapi [options] <AppName>

Arguments:
  AppName                               The name for your new application

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                          Show help information.
  -o|--output <OUTPUT>                  Output directory (default: current
                                        directory)
                                        Default value is:
                                        /tmp/inspectra-help-template.cli-1.0.0-45db203406f6463d96cec2fa2996039e.
  -l|--local-template <LOCAL_TEMPLATE>  Use local template instead of GitHub
  -r|--repository <REPOSITORY>          GitHub repository URL for the template
                                        Default value is:
                                        https://github.com/bernard139/Template_API.git.
  -b|--branch <BRANCH>                  Branch to use (default: Dev)
                                        Default value is: Dev.
  -v|--verbose                          Show verbose output
